rationale: All planned Phase 05 slices have explicit per-slice approval. The implementation is additive, keeps phone reveal private and fail-closed, avoids block disclosure on contact/reveal paths, records durable contact/reveal audit rows, and adds focused privacy, contact, reveal, host-ghost, and abuse-control tests. Phase 05, Phase 04, Phase 03, Phase 02, Prisma validation, typecheck, and lint checks pass.
